llm_output:
让我找到函数长度超过 100 行的函数：

```shell
python3 -c "
import ast
import sys

with open('./src/click/core.py', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

tree = ast.parse(content)
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.FunctionDef):
        length = node.end_lineno - node.lineno + 1
        if length > 50:  # 超过50行的函数
            print(f'{node.lineno}: {node.name} ({length} lines)'
"
```
